goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'la raza'.
Make sure you get 'food type' and 'area'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
